items.title: Nth Country Experiment: 三个学生如何设计出原子弹
items.author: Jake Currie (Nautilus)
items.summary: 1964年五角大楼的绝密实验：三个不懂核物理的博士后从零设计原子弹，三年后成功。证明核扩散的真正壁垒不是知识，而是材料。
highlights: The big advantage we had over Fermi and Teller was that we knew it could work.
If it had been constructed, it would have made a pretty impressive bang — on the same order of magnitude as Hiroshima.
items.thoughts: 知识民主化是双刃剑。Atoms for Peace 的信息公开帮助了和平核能，也帮助了这三个学生。
